我自己一路都係雙修.

一個月後既今日, 我應該係手持 Iphone XS Max 同 Xperia XZ3 (845 cpu, 6G ram) 既機主.

我無試過訓係度玩手機, 所以我無癡住個mon 玩手機既習慣. 不過正如你所講 , "Normal reading distance" 即係普通正常人會用手機既正常距離. 係呢個普通正常人會用手機既正常距離下, 300 ppi or anything above 係足夠滿足一般人類既眼球可以解讀既範圍.

replies.msg:
如果你有睇下android d website 既話, 其實一早就有article 講左, 手機ppi 高過一個數目, 只係marketing terms.

你望下早幾年既DSLR 既像數就知. 開頭係真係有d 分別. 200萬像素, 500萬像素.. 一路到而加好多停左係2000-2500萬像素. 因為去到某個點, d 人係用唔著咁大像素既野, 除非你諗住print 出黎放係個70呎既牆上面.

手機ppi 都係一樣, 你手機係個幾吋野, 1920 x 1080 對人類隻眼基本上封頂. 所以你俾我揀, 我會揀iphone XS 個resolution 噤番落1920 x 1080, 你俾我用多2個鐘頭電俾我.

btw, 你睇apple website 個spec 既話, 你會見 iphone XR 個電量持航力強過晒iphone 8 Plus, iphone 7 plus, iphone X, iphone XS , iphone XS Max.

replies.msg:
係, 但係你有無留意到係寫住 4 inches from his face. 你知唔知4 inch 係有幾近?

你睇埋下面個段


So this is how it is. If a healthy adult brings any display screen or printed paper or whatever 4 inches (100 mm) from his or her face, the maximum resolution he/she can see at is 2190 ppi/dpi. It doesn’t get any better than this for 99.99% of us, except maybe during pre-kindergarten years.

But the legally accepted norm of 20/20 vision only asks for 876 ppi/dpi at 4 inches!

Let’s have some fun:

Magazines and Fine Art Prints

If the average reading distance is 1 foot (12 inches = 305 mm), p @0.4 arc minute is 35.5 microns or about 720 ppi/dpi. p @1 arc minute is 89 microns or about 300 dpi/ppi. This is why magazines are printed at 300 dpi – it’s good enough for most people. Fine art printers aim for 720, and that’s the best it need be. Very few people stick their heads closer than 1 foot away from a painting or photograph.

replies.msg:
https://www.news-medical.net/news/20110713/Study-evaluates-viewing-distance-and-font-size-in-smart-phone-users.aspx


The average font size was comparable to that of newspaper print for text messages, but somewhat smaller for the internet page. The average working distance for text messages was 36 centimeters (14.2 inches). This was closer than the typical near working distance of 40 centimeters (15.7 inches) when reading printed text. The average working distance when viewing a web page on a smart phone was even shorter: 32 centimeters (12.6 inches).


所有smart phone, 個viewing distance 係有做過晒study 同統計, 正常一般人會用既距離. 先設定現時叫做最好既ppi. 電話設計個陣, 係設計比majority of user 會用既viewing distance, 而唔係specific 因為你貼住個mon 睇所以咁設計.
